entity_results.verification_reason: The extracted data correctly identifies the source URLs and includes key phrases from the provided source texts, but it appears to be a concatenation of fragments from multiple sources (digitalpolicy.gov.hk, ofca.gov.hk, pcpd.org.hk) rather than a faithful extraction from a single source. The extracted field 'OFCA政策' is mismatched with the DPO source; '频谱/牌照' and '服务质量' are from OFCA text but not exactly matched; '网络安全' matches the DPO text partially; 'PCPD/AI指引' references a wrong source URL; '数据跨境' is present in the DPO text. Overall, extraction is incomplete and partially inaccurate due to mixing sources and missing coherent context.

raw_records.title: AI Security
raw_records.text_sample: AI Security Skip to content Artificial intelligence AI Security A. PCPD’s Guidance Materials on AI Print Guidance Notes Abuse of AI Deepfakes: Toolkit for Schools and Parents (2025) “Abuse of AI Deepfakes: Toolkit for Schools and Parents” provides practical advice to schools and parents to assist them in handling deepfake incidents involving children and young people, as well as safeguarding their privacy in relation to personal data. Checklist on Guidelines for the Use of Generative AI by Employees (2025) The “Checklist on Guidelines for the Use of Generative AI by Employees” aims to assist organisations in developing internal policies or guidelines on the use of Gen AI by employees at work while complying with the requirements of the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (PDPO).
